metadata.name: NFL Play-by-Play
metadata.description: One row per play. 370+ columns: EPA, WPA, down and distance, game state, player IDs, scoring probabilities, Vegas lines. Covers 1999–present. Filter season_type = 'REG' for regular season only.

metadata.name: Player Stats — Regular Season (Season Totals)
metadata.description: Regular-season cumulative stats per player. One row per player per season. Covers all positions: QBs (passing_yards, passing_tds, interceptions, sacks, passing_epa, cpoe, dakota), RBs (carries, rushing_yards, rushing_tds, rushing_epa), WR/TEs (receptions, targets, receiving_yards, receiving_tds, target_share, wopr, racr, receiving_epa), Ks (fg_made, fg_pct), and defense (def_tackles, def_sacks, def_int). Also includes fantasy_points and fantasy_points_ppr.

metadata.name: Player Stats — Weekly
metadata.description: Weekly player stats for all positions. One row per player per week. Same columns as player_stats_reg but at weekly granularity. Useful for weekly trend analysis, injury-impact studies, and in-season splits. Includes season and week columns for time filtering.

metadata.name: Player Stats — Postseason
metadata.description: Postseason cumulative stats per player. Same columns as player_stats_reg but covering only playoff games. Useful for comparing regular-season vs. playoff performance.

metadata.name: Weekly Rosters
metadata.description: Weekly roster snapshots from 1920 to present. One row per player per week per season. Includes player name, position, team abbreviation, jersey number, status (ACT/INA/RES/etc.), height, weight, birth date, college, and gsis_id.

metadata.name: Weekly Snap Counts
metadata.description: Weekly offensive, defensive, and special teams snap counts and percentages per player. One row per player per week. offense_snaps, defense_snaps, st_snaps are raw counts; offense_pct, defense_pct, st_pct are 0–100 percentages of team total. Available from 2012.

metadata.name: Game Schedules and Results
metadata.description: All NFL game schedules and final results from 1999 to present. One row per game. Includes game_id, season, week, game_type (REG/WC/DIV/CON/SB), teams, final scores, result (home_score - away_score), spread_line, total_line, div_game flag, roof type, surface, temperature, wind, starting QBs, and head coaches.

metadata.name: NextGen Stats — Passing
metadata.description: NFL Next Gen Stats for passers. One row per player per week (or season summary when week is NULL). Key metrics: avg_time_to_throw (seconds from snap to release), aggressiveness (% of passes into tight coverage), completion_percentage_above_expectation (CPAE), avg_air_yards_differential, passer_rating. Covers 2016–present.

metadata.name: NextGen Stats — Receiving
metadata.description: NFL Next Gen Stats for receivers. One row per player per week (or season summary when week is NULL). Key metrics: avg_separation (yards of space at catch point), avg_intended_air_yards, catch_percentage, avg_yac, avg_yac_above_expectation, percent_share_of_intended_air_yards. Covers 2016–present.

metadata.name: NextGen Stats — Rushing
metadata.description: NFL Next Gen Stats for rushers. One row per player per week (or season summary when week is NULL). Key metrics: rush_yards_over_expected (RYOE), rush_yards_over_expected_per_att, efficiency, percent_attempts_gte_eight_defenders (stacked box rate), avg_time_to_los. Covers 2016–present.

metadata.name: PFR Advanced Stats — Passing
metadata.description: Pro Football Reference advanced passing stats per player-season. Key metrics: pressure_pct (% of dropbacks QB was pressured), times_hurried, times_hit, times_sacked, blitzed, bad_throw_pct, on_tgt_pct (on-target throw rate), intended_air_yards_per_pass_attempt (ADOT). Join to players on pfr_id.

metadata.name: PFR Advanced Stats — Rushing
metadata.description: Pro Football Reference advanced rushing stats per player-season. Key metrics: broken_tackles, yards_before_contact, yards_before_contact_per_att, yards_after_contact, yards_after_contact_per_att. Join to players on pfr_id.

metadata.name: PFR Advanced Stats — Receiving
metadata.description: Pro Football Reference advanced receiving stats per player-season. Key metrics: drop_pct (drop rate), target_share (% of team targets), yards_after_catch, adot (average depth of target), broken_tackles. Join to players on pfr_id.

metadata.name: PFR Advanced Stats — Defense
metadata.description: Pro Football Reference advanced defensive stats per player-season. Key metrics: pressures (total QB pressures), blitzes, hurries, mtackles (missed tackles), mtackle_pct (missed tackle rate), targets (times targeted in coverage), completed_passes_allowed, passer_rating_allowed. Join to players on pfr_id.

metadata.name: NFL Combine Results
metadata.description: NFL Combine workout measurements by player and draft year. One row per player. Columns: forty (40-yard dash in seconds, lower is faster), bench (225lb bench press reps), vertical (vertical leap in inches), broad_jump (inches), cone (3-cone drill seconds), shuttle (20-yard short shuttle seconds). NULL means the drill was not attempted or recorded.

metadata.name: NFL Draft Picks
metadata.description: Historical NFL Draft picks from 1936 to present. One row per player selected. Key columns: season (draft year), round, pick (overall pick number), team (selecting team), player_name, position, college, w_av (weighted approximate value — career performance metric), car_av (career AV), dr_av (AV with drafting team only), hof (Hall of Fame flag).

metadata.name: Player ID Register
metadata.description: Cross-system player ID register. One row per player. Maps gsis_id (used in most nflverse tables as the primary key) to pfr_id (Pro Football Reference, used in pfr_advstats and snap_counts), espn_id, pff_id, and others. Also includes display_name, position, status, and current team. Essential for resolving player IDs to names and joining across data sources.
